documentation.description:
This package contains constants and types for the
compiler and the p-code interpreter.

simple_types.name: Compile_Diagnostic
simple_types.code:
type Compile_Diagnostic is
  (err_scanner_character_zero_chars,
   err_scanner_control_character,
   err_scanner_digit_expected,
   err_scanner_double_underline_not_permitted,
   err_scanner_identifier_cannot_end_with_underline,
   err_scanner_identifier_too_long,
   err_scanner_illegal_character,
   err_scanner_illegal_character_in_number,
,
,
,
   …,
   warn_read_but_not_written);

enumeration_literals.name: err_scanner_space_missing_after_number
enumeration_literals.description: Errors that may occur during parsing:

enumeration_literals.name: err_program_incomplete
enumeration_literals.description: These errors messages are new in HAC and weren't in SmallAda

simple_types.name: Diagnostic_Kind_Type
simple_types.code: type Diagnostic_Kind_Type is (error, warning, note, style);

simple_types.name: SF_Code
simple_types.code:
type SF_Code is (
  SF_Abs_Int,
  SF_Abs_Float,
  SF_T_Val,
  SF_T_Pos,
  SF_T_Succ,
  SF_T_Pred,
  SF_in_discrete_Interval,
  SF_not_in_discrete_Interval,
,
,
,
,
,
,
,
,
,
,
,
,
,
,
,
,
  …,
  SF_Get_Needs_Skip_Line
);

enumeration_literals.name: SF_Image_Ints
enumeration_literals.description: HAT.Image without the nasty ' ' before non-negative values

enumeration_literals.name: SF_Image_Floats
enumeration_literals.description: HAT.Image with a human-readable formatting whenever possible

enumeration_literals.name: SF_Get_Needs_Skip_Line
enumeration_literals.description: Informs whether Get from console needs Skip_Line

simple_types.name: SP_Code
simple_types.code:
type SP_Code is (
  SP_Create,
  SP_Open,
  SP_Append,
  SP_Close,
  SP_Push_Abstract_Console,
  SP_Get,
  SP_Get_Immediate,
  SP_Get_Line,
,
,
,
,
,
,
,
,
  …,
  SP_Shell_Execute_Result_Output
);

simple_types.name: Symbol
simple_types.code:
type Symbol is
  (integer_literal,
   real_literal,
   character_literal,
   string_literal,
   Plus,
   Minus,
   Times,
   Divide,
,
,
,
   …,
   XOR_Symbol);

enumeration_literals.name: AND_THEN_Symbol
enumeration_literals.description: This symbol is never scanned as such.

enumeration_literals.name: OR_ELSE_Symbol
enumeration_literals.description: This symbol is never scanned as such.

simple_types.name: Typen
simple_types.code:
type Typen is (
  NOTYP,
  Ints,
  Floats,
  Bools,
  Chars,
  VStrings,
  Times,
  Durations,
,
,
  …,
  Strings_as_VStrings
);

enumeration_literals.name: NOTYP
enumeration_literals.description: Appears when the parsing of an expression fails at some point.

enumeration_literals.name: Text_Files
enumeration_literals.description:
This one is limited (like Ada's File_Type).
----------------------------------
  Types defined by programmers  --
----------------------------------

enumeration_literals.name: String_Literals
enumeration_literals.description: Strings in the "abcd" form. Takes 2 items on the stack.

enumeration_literals.name: Strings_as_VStrings
enumeration_literals.description: VString value, but semantically a String. E.g. returned by S'Image

array_types.name: Diagnostic_Set
array_types.code: type Diagnostic_Set is array (Compile_Diagnostic) of Boolean;

array_types.name: Float_Constants_Table_Type
array_types.code: type Float_Constants_Table_Type is array (1 .. float_const_table_max) of HAC_Float;

array_types.name: Remark_Set
array_types.code: type Remark_Set is array (Compile_Remark) of Boolean;

array_types.name: Symset
array_types.code: type Symset is array (Symbol) of Boolean;

documentation.description: The "+" and "-" reproduce the Pascal set operators.

array_types.name: Typ_Set
array_types.code: type Typ_Set is array (Typen) of Boolean;

record_types.name: Flow_Context

fields.name: level
fields.description:
This is for rudimentary flow analysis
and the issuance of clever warnings and notes.

record_types.name: Symbol_Location

tagged_types.name: Diagnostic_Kit
Repair_Kit

access_types.name: Smart_Error_Pipe
access_types.code: type Smart_Error_Pipe is access procedure (kit : Diagnostic_Kit);

subtypes.name: Alfa
subtypes.code: subtype Alfa is HAT.VString;

subtypes.name: Arithmetic_Binary_Operator
subtypes.code: subtype Arithmetic_Binary_Operator is Symbol range Plus .. Power;

subtypes.name: Comparison_Operator
subtypes.code: subtype Comparison_Operator is Symbol range EQL .. LEQ;

subtypes.name: Compile_Error
Compile_Note
subtypes.code:
subtype Compile_Note is Compile_Diagnostic
  range note_redundant_construct .. note_constant_variable;

subtypes.name: Compile_Remark
subtypes.code:
subtype Compile_Remark is Compile_Diagnostic
  range Compile_Note'First .. Compile_Warning'Last;

subtypes.name: Compile_Warning
subtypes.code:
subtype Compile_Warning is Compile_Diagnostic
  range warn_read_but_not_written .. warn_read_but_not_written;

subtypes.name: Composite_Typ
subtypes.code: subtype Composite_Typ is Typen range Arrays .. Records;

subtypes.name: HAC_Float
subtypes.code: subtype HAC_Float is HAT.Real;

subtypes.name: HAC_Integer
subtypes.code: subtype HAC_Integer is Interfaces.Integer_64;

subtypes.name: Index
subtypes.code: subtype Index is Integer range -XMax .. +XMax;

subtypes.name: Nesting_Level
subtypes.code: subtype Nesting_Level is HAC_Integer range 0 .. nesting_level_max;

subtypes.name: Numeric_Typ
subtypes.code: subtype Numeric_Typ is Typen range Ints .. Floats;

subtypes.name: Plus_Minus
subtypes.code: subtype Plus_Minus is Symbol range Plus .. Minus;

subtypes.name: Remark_Type
subtypes.code: subtype Remark_Type is Diagnostic_Kind_Type range warning .. note;

subtypes.name: SF_File_or_Console_Information
subtypes.code: subtype SF_File_or_Console_Information is SF_Code range SF_EOF .. SF_EOLN;

subtypes.name: SF_Index_Any_Direction
subtypes.code: subtype SF_Index_Any_Direction is SF_Code range SF_Index .. SF_Index_Backward;

subtypes.name: SF_Min_Max_Int
subtypes.code: subtype SF_Min_Max_Int is SF_Code range SF_Min_Int .. SF_Max_Int;

subtypes.name: SF_Niladic
subtypes.code: subtype SF_Niladic is SF_Code range SF_Clock .. SF_Get_Needs_Skip_Line;

subtypes.name: SP_Shell_Execute
subtypes.code:
subtype SP_Shell_Execute is SP_Code
  range SP_Shell_Execute_without_Result .. SP_Shell_Execute_Result_Output;

subtypes.name: Special_Strings
subtypes.code: subtype Special_Strings is Typen range String_Literals .. Strings_as_VStrings;

subtypes.name: Standard_Typ
subtypes.code: subtype Standard_Typ is Typen range NOTYP .. Text_Files;

subtypes.name: Strings_Constants_Table_Type
subtypes.code: subtype Strings_Constants_Table_Type is String (1 .. SMax);

documentation.description:
Maximum digits for an integer literal, was KMAX:
decimal representation of 2**63, minus 1 digit.

constants.name: Auto_Init_Typ
constants.code:
Auto_Init_Typ : constant Typ_Set :=
  (VStrings | Text_Files => True, others => False);

documentation.description:
Maximum digits for an integer literal, was KMAX:
decimal representation of 2**63, minus 1 digit.

Maximum digits for an integer literal, was KMAX:
decimal representation of 2**63, minus 1 digit.

Maximum digits for an integer literal, was KMAX:
decimal representation of 2**63, minus 1 digit.

constants.name: Discrete_Typ
constants.code:
Discrete_Typ : constant Typ_Set :=
  (Ints | Bools | Chars | Enums => True, others  => False);

documentation.description:

decimal representation of 2**63, minus 1 digit.

decimal representation of 2**63, minus 1 digit.
Stands for:  HAC Ada Toolbox (was: Library).

constants.name: Header
constants.code: Header : constant String := "HAC - HAC Ada Compiler";

documentation.description:

Was: "Small-Ada  Macintosh Ver 1.1  Nov 1989  George Washington University"

decimal representation of 2**63, minus 1 digit.

constants.name: preset_remarks
constants.code:
preset_remarks : constant array (Remark_Level) of Remark_Set :=
  (0 => (others => False),
   1 => (warn_read_but_not_written => True, others => False),
   …
   3 => (others => True));

documentation.description: Max # of concurrent tasks

constants.name: remark_letter
constants.code:
remark_letter : constant array (Compile_Remark) of Character :=
  (note_redundant_construct => 'r',
   note_unused_item         => 'u',
   …
   warn_read_but_not_written => 'v');

documentation.description: Max # of concurrent tasks

constants.name: Standard_or_Enum_Typ
constants.code:
Standard_or_Enum_Typ : constant Typ_Set :=
  (Standard_Typ | Enums => True, others => False);

documentation.description: Stack Increment allocated per Task
Stack Increment allocated per Task
Max # of concurrent tasks

constants.name: Typ_with_Variant_Part
constants.code:
Typ_with_Variant_Part : constant Typ_Set :=
  (Floats | VStrings | Times | Durations | Text_Files => True, others => False);

subprograms.code: function "+" (a : Symset; b : Symbol) return Symset
function "-" (a : Symset; b : Symbol) return Symset

generic_instantiations.name: HAC_Image
generic_instantiations.code: function HAC_Image is new HAT.HAC_Generic_Image (Abstract_Integer => HAC_Integer);
